footerSubtext:
EDUROM Recruitment is a specialised Tech Recruitment Agency, successfully matching Romanian IT professionals with clients across Europe and the USA since 2008. 
Part of the Edurom Group, which assists organisations in achieving outstanding results through Human Resources and Management Consulting services.
